narrative:
Cols 75-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,286 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.7 percentage points.
